Operation 'registerWebhooks' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on input requirements (RegisterWebhooksRequest structure), output format (what is returned), and webhook lifecycle. Enhanced description specifies request/response schemas, explains the webhook trigger mechanism, and clarifies that webhook IDs are returned for management purposes, improving AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Register webhooks for one or more forms. When a form submission occurs, the webhook URL will receive the form data.
data.description_suggestion: Register webhooks for one or more forms to receive form submission notifications. Accepts a RegisterWebhooksRequest containing form IDs and webhook URLs. When a form submission occurs, the specified webhook URL will receive a POST request with the form submission data. Returns a RegisterWebhooksResponse with webhook registration details and IDs for future reference or deletion.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on input requirements (RegisterWebhooksRequest structure), output format (what is returned), and webhook lifecycle. Enhanced description specifies request/response schemas, explains the webhook trigger mechanism, and clarifies that webhook IDs are returned for management purposes, improving AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'deleteWebhooks' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies that webhook IDs are required inputs (obtained from registration), explains the side effect (webhooks stop receiving notifications), and specifies the response type. This helps AI agents understand the prerequisite knowledge needed and the operation's impact.

data.current_description: Delete specific webhooks by their IDs.
data.description_suggestion: Delete specific webhooks by their IDs. Requires webhook IDs obtained from webhook registration. Removes the specified webhooks so they will no longer receive form submission notifications. Returns a success response confirming deletion.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies that webhook IDs are required inputs (obtained from registration), explains the side effect (webhooks stop receiving notifications), and specifies the response type. This helps AI agents understand the prerequisite knowledge needed and the operation's impact.

message: Operation 'deleteTokenWebhooks' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on the destructive nature and scope of the operation. Enhanced version explicitly states this removes all webhooks (not just some), clarifies the side effect (all webhooks stop receiving notifications), specifies the response type, and warns that this is a destructive operation. This helps AI agents understand the severity and scope before executing.

data.current_description: Delete all webhooks associated with the current API token.
data.description_suggestion: Delete all webhooks associated with the current API token. This operation removes all webhook registrations for the authenticated token, preventing all registered webhooks from receiving future form submission notifications. Returns a success response confirming the deletion. This is a destructive operation affecting all webhooks under the token.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on the destructive nature and scope of the operation. Enhanced version explicitly states this removes all webhooks (not just some), clarifies the side effect (all webhooks stop receiving notifications), specifies the response type, and warns that this is a destructive operation. This helps AI agents understand the severity and scope before executing.
